THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEPA, TOM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET, NO. 401, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-10-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT PAYS TO PLAINTIFF $500.00 ON OR BEFORE THURSDAY DECEMBER 3, 1998, THEN DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY THROUGH 1/10/99, AT WHICH TIME HE SHALL QUIT POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY.
